**1. `INTERNAL_TOKEN = os.environ.get('INTERNAL_TOKEN', '')` — silent security no-op (line 62)**

This is a real subtle bug. When `INTERNAL_TOKEN` is not set (missing env var), it defaults to `''`. Line 159 guards with `if INTERNAL_TOKEN and ...`, which correctly short-circuits — so the token path is skipped entirely when the env var is absent. That part is fine.
